narrative.description: Portal 2 expands portal-based spatial puzzles with new gel mechanics, cooperative two-player chambers, and a full narrative campaign.
narrative.core_loop: Solve single-player chambers using portals, gels, and switches, then coordinate portal placement with a partner in dedicated co-op test tracks.

mechanics.map_notes: In Portal 2, floppy character bodies interact with physics objects to solve environmental puzzles.
mechanics.expression: In Portal 2, floppy character bodies interact with physics objects to solve environmental puzzles.

mechanics.map_notes: In Portal 2, interconnected rooms hide switches, keys, and environmental secrets.
mechanics.expression: In Portal 2, interconnected rooms hide switches, keys, and environmental secrets.

mechanics.map_notes: In Portal 2, teams hold out against escalating enemy waves to reach extraction.
mechanics.expression: In Portal 2, teams hold out against escalating enemy waves to reach extraction.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Portal 2 through its core puzzle loop.
